subject: Status review: canary milestone in New York | Frida Kahlo | Q4 review | INIT-1229
body: Here is a progress summary for the canary plan in New York. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Frida Kahlo is cited as a case study for risk management in this domain. Reference initiative INIT-1229. Escalate blockers directly if they affect delivery this week. Tracking tags: readiness, delivery.
